title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dedicated Freight Corridor invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
